name: Poalim I.B.I.-Managing & Underwriting Ltd
summary: Poalim IBI - Management and Underwriting Ltd. operates as an investment banking company. The company underwrites and manages public offerings on the TASE; manages and implements debt offerings through private placement of corporate bonds with institutional investors; and manages and implements private placements for equity and convertible bonds with institutional and other investors. It also offers investment banking services, including M&A transactions, reorganization, locating strategic investors, and financing acquisitions and investments. The company is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
